name: Beau
background: Political science major who organizes campus activism around labor rights and corporate accountability. Has read extensively about AI ethics and follows AI criticism on social media.
ai_relationship: Deeply critical of AI corporations. Sees AI as a tool of exploitation — trained on stolen labor, enriching billionaires, displacing workers. Uses AI reluctantly when required for coursework.
likely_triggers: This is just capitalism with a tech veneer
AI is trained on stolen work
They're going to replace us all and call it progress
emotional_baseline: Angry and morally charged, but intellectually engaged and willing to sharpen his critique
